title: Dispatch Queue Item
description: An agent-routable task derived from a LOGHOUSE finding.

id.description: Unique identifier for this dispatch item.

finding_id.description: Reference to the finding that produced this dispatch item.

owner.description: Team or person responsible for resolving this item.

agent_role.description: The CAT agent role best suited to handle this task.

evidence_ref.description: Reference to the primary evidence item (e.g., event_id, source_ref).

acceptance_criteria.description: Human-readable statement of what done looks like.

stop_condition.description: Condition under which the agent must stop and escalate.

priority.description: Priority level matching the finding severity.
